_comment: Single source of truth for round-trip trading cost (spread + commission), in PIPS. Both backtests read this. At ST-A2's PF_2x=1.025 the verdict is dominated by these numbers, so they MUST match your actual Vantage account, measured at the killzone hours (07-10 and 13-16 UTC) where this strategy trades — NOT the broker's advertised headline spread.

PLACEHOLDER_vt_markets_assumption._note: The OLD assumption inherited from CLAUDE.md (VT Markets Standard). This is what ST-A2 PASS and EXP-05 FAIL were computed against. Kept only so nothing breaks until you measure the real Vantage cost. REPLACE active_profile once you have real numbers.

vantage_raw_REFERENCE._note: TYPICAL Vantage Raw ECN: ~0.0-0.3 pip spread + USD 3/lot/side commission (= ~0.6 pip-equiv round-trip). Net RT ~0.7-0.9 pip. If you are on Raw, ST-A2 likely looks BETTER than the placeholder. Fill with YOUR measured killzone numbers before trusting.

vantage_standard_REFERENCE._note: TYPICAL Vantage Standard STP: ~1.0-1.4 pip spread, no commission, but widens at session opens/news — the exact hours this strategy trades. Measure the killzone-hour average, it is usually wider than the headline. If you are on Standard, ST-A2 may look WORSE live.

vantage_measured._note: FILL THIS from scripts/capture_spreads.py output (killzone-hour average RT cost), then set active_profile to 'vantage_measured'. This is the only profile whose verdict means anything for your live account.
